rooms.name: Central Clearing
rooms.description: The heart of the skerry — a small patch of solid ground amid the void. A faint warmth radiates from the world seed's presence below. From here, paths lead to the other areas of your fragile home.
aspects: The Ground Hums With Something Alive

rooms.name: Basic Shelter
rooms.description: A rough structure cobbled together from salvaged hull plating and fabric. It blocks the view of the void, barely. There's room for a few people to sleep, though comfort is a generous word for it.
aspects: Better Than Nothing, Worse Than Home

rooms.name: The Hollow
rooms.description: A natural depression in the skerry's surface where the world seed has taken root. Faint green light pulses from below, and you can feel its awareness pressing gently against your mind. This is where you commune with the seed and feed it motes.
aspects: The Light Reaches Into Your Mind

rooms.name: The Junkyard
rooms.description: A rough clearing where salvage gets piled. Metal scraps, wire coils, torn fabric — everything Sevarik drags back from the void ends up here, sorted by Miria into rough categories. It's not pretty, but it's organized enough to find what you need.
aspects: One Person's Trash Is Another's Foundation
It Smells Like Rust and Ambition

rooms.name: Landing Pad
rooms.description: The edge of the skerry where the void begins. From here, you can see the distant glimmer of the debris field to the south, the soft glow of the coral thicket to the east, the cold glitter of the frozen wreck to the west, and a warm green shimmer drifting above. Four nodes in the dark. This is where explorers depart and return.
aspects: One Step Further and You're in the Nothing
Every Journey Starts With Leaving Safety

expandable_rooms.name: Storehouse
expandable_rooms.description: A solid structure of salvaged metal and lashed beams. Shelves line the walls, organized by material type. Everything has a place. Lira's influence is obvious — even the crates are labeled in her precise handwriting.

expandable_rooms.name: Workshop
expandable_rooms.description: A proper workspace with a sturdy bench and basic tools mounted on the walls. Here, salvage becomes something useful.
aspects: The Right Tool for Any Job
Easy to Lose Track of Time Here

expandable_rooms.name: Garden
expandable_rooms.description: A patch of cultivated ground tilled from the skerry's thin soil, enriched by the world seed's ambient energy. Four plots of worked earth await planting, each marked with a simple stone border.
aspects: The Soil Wants What the Seed Wants

expandable_rooms.name: Water Collection
expandable_rooms.description: Crystal shards arranged in a precise pattern collect and purify moisture from the void-mist. The water tastes faintly of minerals but is clean and safe.
aspects: Pure Water in a Place That Has None
The Crystals Are Finicky About Alignment

expandable_rooms.name: Lookout Post
expandable_rooms.description: A raised platform built from ancient alloys, offering a clear view in all directions. From here, you can spot approaching threats — or opportunities — long before they arrive.
aspects: See Trouble Coming From Miles Away
Up Here, Everything Can See You Too
